# Chapter 11: Sensors and actuators  (~130 pp)
- 11.1 Sensor families revisited at design depth (15) · 11.2 Calibration in the system context (12) · 11.3 Sensor fusion preview (12) · 11.4 Actuators: motors (DC, BLDC, stepper, servo) (20) · 11.5 Hydraulic and pneumatic actuators (15) · 11.6 Piezoelectric and shape-memory actuators (12) · 11.7 Driver electronics for actuators (18) · 11.8 Failure section: sensor drift unaccounted for; actuator stalls and runaway (26)

**Archetype**: interface, control. **Project**: build a closed-loop position controller using a motor and an encoder. **Exercises**: 30.
